title: Define removal scope and locate workspace_root references
summary: Identify every reference to workspace_root across rules, code, and tests to scope removal work.
acceptance_criteria: A complete list of workspace_root references across .rules, src, tests, and docs is captured in notes.
Removal scope identifies config schema, runtime usage, and test expectations.
Findings align with the 0.4.1 plan and guide subsequent tickets.

steps.description: Search the repository for workspace_root references and categorize by area.
Document impacted files and the type of change needed (delete, update, or replace).
Confirm no hidden dependency is required for runtime behavior.

notes: References found: .rules; docs/rules_short; docs/rules_long; README.md; README-jp.md; src/agentops_mcp_server/main.py; src/agentops_mcp_server/repo_context.py; src/agentops_mcp_server/tool_router.py; src/agentops_mcp_server/zed-agentops-init.sh; tests/test_init.py; tests/test_main_wrappers.py; tests/test_repo_context.py; tests/test_tool_router.py; docs/draft.md; docs/v0.2.2/ticket-p1-t01.json; docs/v0.2.2/ticket-p1-t02.json; docs/v0.2.2/ticket-p1-t03.json; docs/v0.2.2/tickets_list.json; docs/v0.3.1/p1-t01-design.md; docs/v0.3.1/p1-t03-verification.md.
